name: Rockhaven Resources Ltd.
description: Rockhaven Resources Ltd. is an exploration and development company advancing its 100%-owned Klaza gold-silver project in the Whitehorse Mining District of Yukon, covering 25,000 hectares approximately 50 km west of Carmacks. The Klaza project hosts a defined gold-silver deposit with a completed preliminary economic assessment, and the company continues to explore multiple lightly tested targets across the large land package. Rockhaven is a well-funded explorer focused on growing the Klaza resource toward a development decision.
